title: ただ、成すべきを成すのみ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the academy is holding an event for
children to experience what it's like to be
enrolled at the school. Yaeno Muteki has been
assigned a group of children to guide.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look! You can see the whole track from here! And
there's people running! One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Just full of energy, aren't we? ♪ Be
careful not to lean out too far—it's dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If anyone wants a better look, I'll hoist you onto
my shoulders! Just raise your hand if you'd like a
lift!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... I can't figure it out! How do I close the
gap between us?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's beyond me! I just don't know how to address
the children! Compared to those two, I'm horribly
awkward... And on top of that—

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mimi. Do you think I'll be able to see my
house if I get a piggyback ride?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: We're not getting piggyback rides, we're getting shoulder rides!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I want to keep them safe! But being
overprotective would disrupt the orientation and
impede their independence!
choice_data_list:
Don't you have any experience dealing with
kids at the dojo?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Now that you mention it, I used to train my
younger brother. Maybe I could adopt the same
approach with these children!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Squad, fall in! Bow to, er, bow before the
Three Goddesses! Now bow to your
mast—anyway, bow to me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You there! Bow properly! Put some spirit into it!
Spirit!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume D
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's... kinda scary...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now I've done it! When I talk to them like they're
my little brother, my true nature slips out! This is
only going to make things worse!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I think a more casual approach might
suffice. Just be yourself. Treat the children as you
would anyone else, and I'm sure they'll take to
you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I'm really not confident I can do it. I'm so
unrefined... What if I end up scaring them?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Shiho's not here... Where'd she go?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. There's a child missing from Yaeno
Muteki's group. I'm pretty sure the girl was here a
moment ago...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ah, there she is!

text_block_list.name: Extremely Curious Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whoa... They're amazing. Everyone's so fast...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see the child mesmerized by the students
running on the track, wandering dangerously
close to it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Oh no! Somebody could hit her!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I need to help her right away... but will I make it
in time?! Yaeno, you fool! You should have been
paying more attention!)
(Yaeno! Do not hesitate!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
No matter how strong your opponent or how dire
the situation, remember that retreat is a fool's
errand. Fear leads only to failure. Overcome it,
lest your path remain forever closed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Should doubt form in your heart, there is only one
answer. Take pride in yourself, determine the
path you must take, and do what needs to be
done!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Yes! Right now, I must pour my heart and soul
into doing one thing and one thing only!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what did I do?

text_block_list.name: Extremely Curious Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That was... amazing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-Yaeno! What was that just now?! Where did that speed come from? I couldn't believe my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You shot forward in the blink of an eye and
scooped the child right off the track!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: You were sooo awesome! That was the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see... I did what needed to be done.
choice_data_list:
You won them over with actions rather than
words!

You won them over with actions rather than
words!

You're one with the teachings of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

You're one with the teachings of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see... I did what needed to be done.
choice_data_list:
You won them over with actions rather than
words!

You won them over with actions rather than
words!

You're one with the teachings of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

You're one with the teachings of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I remembered Grandfather's words—the Yaegaki
teachings passed down through generations of
warriors.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hold your head high as a protector of the people.
When facing crisis, neither hesitate nor
speak—simply do what is right.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The teachings that live in my body compelled it
to move of its own accord. Yes... That is what I
believe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have stumbled for a moment, but Yaeno
Muteki prevails of her own strength and grows
more confident in the process. The orientation
goes on to conclude without further incident.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Kon...go yaigocky style?! If I study that, can I
become as strong as you?! I wanna learn it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I warn you... Kongo Yaegaki training is extremely
rigorous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, how about giving them a glimpse of
what it's like? Everyone seems so excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Very well. Let's try once again... Fall in
line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki takes on the role of mentor to the
children, and the orientation comes to a close
with her having earned their respect.
